title: The night is safe
subtitle: A two-word reset for the moment bedtime anxiety flickers.
excerpt: A short affirmation from Day 12 of the SLEEP program. Three words to counter the body's learned anticipation of a bad night, used as a daytime reset and again in the moments before bed.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 12 of SLEEP: A 30-Day Tapping Intensive to Fall Asleep Faster and Wake Energised (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798269649795).

content.text: A short affirmation from Day 12 of the SLEEP program. Used to interrupt the anticipatory fear that builds before bedtime, not at midnight when the pattern is already running, but earlier, when it's just beginning.

Say it out loud three times in the morning, hand on chest. Use it again in the afternoon when the thought of tonight arrives: three words, slowly, with a breath after each repetition. The aim is to give the nervous system a different signal before the old pattern activates.
Adapted from Day 12 of SLEEP: A 30-Day Tapping Intensive to Fall Asleep Faster and Wake Energised (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
